step_rationale: ECM proteoglycan; versican loss/cleavage weakens fibrous cap and increases rupture risk.
mechanism: Versican remodeling in the fibrous cap reduces structural integrity and promotes cap degradation.

references.title: Proteomic analysis of the extracellular matrix of human atherosclerotic plaques shows marked changes between plaque types.
Proteomics and bioinformatics analysis of cardiovascular related proteins in offspring exposed to gestational diabetes mellitus.
Differential accumulation of proteoglycans and hyaluronan in culprit lesions: insights into plaque erosion.
